seoTitle: South Talwood vs South Toowoomba — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Talwood and South Toowoomba. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Talwood vs South Toowoomba: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Talwood and South Toowoomba.
heading: South Talwood vs South Toowoomba — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Talwood, Queensland and South Toowoomba, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Talwood has a lower overall climate risk score (24/100) compared to South Toowoomba (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Talwood or South Toowoomba safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Talwood has a flood risk score of 29/100, while South Toowoomba scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Talwood scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. South Toowoomba scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Talwood or South Toowoomba?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Talwood has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.27% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
